race.comment: Lots of win chances. MERLIN BEACH (3) was beaten just a length here two back, then not far away on the Devonport Synthetic in a similar race last time. Looks well placed here and draws the rails. Looks a top chance. SOUTH GEORGIA (10) wasn't far away in a Class 1 latest here finishing fourth. Long overdue and going better than form looks. NORTHERN CHILD (4) is another go-forward type drawn wide. Won maiden here last time and can give a sight again. COLD AZA BEER (7) is the big watch. Former Victorian maiden having first run for the new yard. Presents fit and best ratings measure right up. Looks a threat.
